Incident Log

Operational fields only — no victim, witness, staff or officer personal details are shown
Sport Centre Incident Dashboard — all figures derived from Sport Centre Incident Report.xlsx. Identifying personal data (names, contact numbers, NRIC/ID, addresses, medical history, and next-of-kin/witness/staff/officer details) is intentionally excluded from every view. The Case ID hover summary additionally shows victim condition/injury as non-identifying clinical severity context, and the initial report / incident update narrative notes.
